data.title: Hyperliquid early contributor Loracle sold 450,000 HYPE tokens for $15.5 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, Loracle, an early contributor to Hyperliquid, transferred 450,000 HYPE tokens from HyperEVM 20 minutes ago and began selling them subsequently, valued at approximately $15.5 million. Odaily reminds users that market prices are highly volatile, and investors should participate with caution.

data.title: Citigroup: Expects average Brent crude oil price to reach $130 per barrel in a bullish scenario for Q2.
data.description: Citigroup stated that it expects the average price of Brent crude oil to be $95 per barrel in the second quarter of 2026 under the baseline scenario, and $130 per barrel under the bullish scenario. (Jinshi)

data.title: Global X Launches Ethereum Covered Call ETF
data.description:
Global X, a New York-based ETF provider, has announced the launch of the Global X Ethereum Covered Call ETF (EHCC). According to Foresight News, this ETF employs an options strategy to offer exposure to Ethereum-related investments, aiming to generate returns without directly holding digital assets.

This marks Global X's first venture into creating a fund associated with a cryptocurrency other than Bitcoin.

data.title: Blue Cat Capital Stock Drops 7.6%, Hits Record Low Intraday Price
data.description: Blue Cat Capital's stock experienced a significant decline, falling 7.6% to reach its lowest intraday price on record. According to Jin10, this drop marks a historic low for the company, reflecting ongoing market volatility and investor concerns. The decline in stock value highlights the challenges faced by Blue Cat Capital in maintaining investor confidence amid fluctuating market conditions.

data.title: Uniswap Expands to Linea Network with v2, v3, and v4 Launch
data.description: Uniswap has announced the launch of its v2, v3, and v4 versions on the Linea network. According to Foresight News, Linea is a zkEVM Layer 2 scaling network developed by Consensys. The integration allows users to access Linea through the Uniswap Web application and API. Additionally, support for Uniswap Wallet on iOS and Android is being gradually introduced.

data.title: Project 0 Addresses Drift Vulnerability Impact
data.description:
Project 0 co-founder MacBrennan has provided an update regarding the handling of the Drift vulnerability incident. According to Foresight News, the team aims to complete the socialization of losses for all affected Drift users within the day, with the latest completion by tomorrow. Before resuming operations, they will disclose all calculation methods and processes.

Project 0 stated that Drift lenders will bear losses proportionally, while non-Drift lenders may face a maximum devaluation of approximately 2% in the unified fund pool. The current loss assessment is based on the most conservative scenario of Drift assets being reduced to zero. However, the situation is expected to improve as Drift's asset distribution plan becomes clearer. All users affected by the devaluation will be recorded via snapshot and will receive compensation distribution once funds are recovered.

data.title: BitGo launches BitGo Mint institutional minting service, initially supporting USD1 and SoFiUSD.
data.description: Digital asset custody provider BitGo has launched BitGo Mint, offering institutional clients the ability to mint, redeem, and manage stablecoins and other digital assets. Initially, it supports the Trump-endorsed World Liberty stablecoin USD1, and SoFiUSD, issued by SoFi Bank, which is regulated by the US OCC and insured by the FDIC. BitGo stated that the service targets market makers, liquidity providers, banks, exchanges, asset management firms, and fintech companies, aiming to integrate stablecoin minting and redemption processes into their existing custody and operations platforms, reducing operational complexity for institutions in the stablecoin business. (The Block)

data.title: Polymarket integrates Pyth Pro, providing access to real-time oracles for traditional assets such as gold, crude oil, and US stocks.
data.description: According to Pyth's official disclosure, the decentralized prediction market platform Polymarket has completed its integration with Pyth Pro, using it as a source of price data for traditional asset contracts, covering gold, silver, major stock index ETFs, WTI crude oil, natural gas, and over ten US stocks (including TSLA, COIN, PLTR, etc.). Polymarket accesses Pyth Pro's real-time price data via WebSocket, sampling once per second and presenting it in dynamic charts, providing traders with continuous price visibility. Pyth Pro's data is directly provided by leading trading firms such as Jump Trading, Blue Ocean, LMAX, Cboe, and Jane Street.

data.title: Fundrise Innovation Fund VCX will collaborate with Kraken to advance share tokenization.
data.description: Fundrise, a technology investment platform, announced a partnership with cryptocurrency exchange Kraken to tokenize its fund shares. The tokenized asset, named VCXx, will be traded on Kraken's xStocks platform and can be purchased using USDG or US dollars. (Crowdfundinsider)

data.title: Analysts: Trump's speech drives oil prices soar, risk premiums surge.
data.description: Crude oil futures prices surged after Trump's remarks on the war with Iran dampened traders' expectations for a swift end to the Middle East conflict. TP ICAP analyst Scott Shelton stated in a report, "Oil prices were under pressure for most of the week, but Trump's speech caused an overnight surge. The speech focused more on escalation and 'completing the mission,' with almost no mention of peace negotiations." He noted that while the move may have been intended to force Iran back to the negotiating table, risk premiums have risen sharply. (Jinshi)

data.title: Wirex and Ultra Stellar Unveil Stellar-Based Payment Infrastructure
data.description: Wirex and Ultra Stellar have introduced a new payment infrastructure built on Soroban, a native Stellar platform. According to NS3.AI, Wirex claims to serve over 7 million users worldwide. The newly developed stack aims to facilitate stablecoin bank accounts, card issuance, payouts, and yield directly on the Stellar network.

data.title: YZi Labs Makes Follow-On Investment in Predict.fun, Joined by Susquehanna Crypto
data.description: According to YZi Labs' post on X, the $10 billion venture investment vehicle has made a strategic follow-on investment in Predict.fun, a crypto-native prediction market platform on BNB Chain, with Susquehanna Crypto participating as a co-investor. Financial terms were not disclosed. The investment follows Predict.fun's graduation from EASY Residency Season 2, YZi Labs' incubation program. The platform has self-reported $1.8 billion in cumulative trading volume, more than 130,000 users, over 4 million orders matched, and more than $20 million in assets actively earning yield. In March, Predict.fun acquired Probable, a prediction market previously incubated by PancakeSwap and YZi Labs, to expand distribution in Asian markets.

data.title: YZi Labs makes a strategic follow-on investment in Predict.fun, an on-chain prediction market platform.
data.description: YZi Labs announced on the X platform that it has made a strategic follow-on investment in Predict.fun, an on-chain prediction market platform, following the completion of the second quarter of its EASY Residency incubation program. This round of financing includes investment from Susquehanna Crypto, a globally renowned digital asset exchange, aiming to support the continued development of capital-efficient on-chain prediction markets. YZi Labs stated that its continued investment reflects its strong confidence in the prediction market sector and the growth potential of Predict.fun. Reportedly, industry trading volume approached $64 billion in 2025, a year-on-year increase of approximately four times, and is projected to exceed $325 billion in 2026. Predict.fun, through native DeFi integration, transforms idle collateralized assets into yield-generating assets, creating a liquidity flywheel and thereby improving capital utilization efficiency.

data.title: Tesla Misses Quarterly Sales Expectations Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Tesla (TSLA.O) reported one of its weakest quarterly sales performances in recent years, failing to meet Wall Street expectations, according to Jin10. The company announced on Thursday that its global deliveries for the first quarter totaled 358,023 vehicles, falling short of analysts' median forecast of 372,160 vehicles, which had been revised downward in recent weeks. This marks the second consecutive quarter Tesla has not met expectations.

Investors have largely overlooked Tesla's sales trends as CEO Elon Musk shifts focus to future business lines such as artificial intelligence, autonomous driving, and robotics. However, the traditional automotive business remains Tesla's primary source of cash. Following the release of the delivery data, Tesla's stock fell 4% in pre-market trading. As of Wednesday's close, the stock had declined 15% this year and was down 22% from its all-time high in December last year.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 66,000 USDT with a 3.55% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2026, 13:12 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 66,000 USDT and is now trading at 65,992.460938 USDT, with a narrowed 3.55% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Key Developments in AI Agent Economic Infrastructure
data.description: Recent advancements in AI agent economic infrastructure have been highlighted in a report, focusing on x402, ERC-8004, Virtuals Protocol, and OpenClaw. According to NS3.AI, x402 has facilitated over 100 million transactions, achieving an annualized payment volume of $600 million. ERC-8004 was launched on the Ethereum mainnet on January 29, 2026, marking a significant milestone. Additionally, the Virtuals Protocol has successfully deployed more than 18,000 agents, contributing to an aGDP of $479 million.

data.title: IMF Projects U.S. GDP Growth to Reach 2% in 2025
data.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has projected that the United States' GDP growth rate will reach 2% by 2025. According to Jin10, this forecast reflects the IMF's analysis of the U.S. economic trajectory over the coming years. The projection takes into account various economic factors and potential policy changes that could influence growth. The IMF's outlook suggests a steady economic expansion, although it remains subject to global economic conditions and domestic policy decisions. This growth rate is seen as a positive indicator for the U.S. economy, aligning with broader expectations of gradual recovery and stability.

data.title: IMF: U.S. Tariff-Induced Inflation Pressure Expected to Ease
data.description: According to Jin10, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) has projected that the inflationary pressure in the United States, driven by tariffs, is likely to diminish. Additionally, the IMF anticipates that oil prices will decline from their current elevated levels. This outlook suggests a potential easing of economic pressures that have been affecting the U.S. economy.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | International Spot Gold Faces Key Resistance Levels
data.description: International spot gold is currently trading within a low peak range, with a significant gap at 46XX being the primary focus for traders. According to Jin10, further resistance is anticipated at the 47XX level, which could exert pressure on upward movement.

data.title: IMF Projects Government Deficit to Remain at 7-7.5% of GDP
data.description: According to Jin10, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) has projected that the general government deficit is expected to remain within the range of 7% to 7.5% of GDP. Additionally, public debt is anticipated to exceed 140% of GDP by 2031. These projections highlight ongoing fiscal challenges and the potential for increased financial strain on government resources in the coming years.
